base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dhalsim — a character from 1991 street fighter ii. Dhalsim — stretchy-limbs + Yoga Fire + Yoga Flame + teleport. Zoner archetype. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dhalsim — stretchy-limbs + Yoga Fire + Yoga Flame + teleport. Zoner archetype
